name: Clockwork Engineer Outfit
description: A bundle which contains the Clockwork Engineer outfit. This outfit includes a head, torso, belt, hand, leg and feet slot clothing piece.

name: Everwoods Healer's Outfit
description: A bundle which contains the Everwoods Hearler outfit. This outfit includes a head, torso, belt, hand, leg and feet slot clothing piece.

name: Cozy Winter Clothing Bundle
description: A bundle of winter clothing that contains a matching winter sweater and beanie for your character.

name: Festive Winter Clothing Bundle
description: A bundle of winter clothing that contains a matching winter sweater and beanie for your character.

name: Exploring Emote
description: Teaches your character to use the "Explore" emote

name: Titan Furniture Set
description: A set of furniture for your house. Once purchased, these items can be found in your vault. Right click them to withdraw them from your vault and use them in game!

name: Regal Fabric
description: A special piece of cloth which could be used to make empire banners to show off your empire's colors. Once purchased, this will go into your vault where it can be withdrawn to build the banners. Banners require either 1 or 2 cloth depending on the banner and you can check the recipes for these in the compendium.

name: Knitted Winter Clothing Bundle
description: A bundle of winter clothing that contains a matching winter sweater and beanie for your character.

name: Everwoods Pair Outfit Bundle
description: A bundle which contains both full everwoods outfits: Healer and Warrior. Each outfits includes a head, torso, belt, hand, leg and feet slot clothing piece.

name: Chrono
description: A whimsical and clever owl.

name: Are You Not Entertained
description: Teaches your character to use the "Are you not Entertained?" emote

name: Emote: THINK!
description: This provides your character with a new emote. The emote can be found in your vault once purchased. Use it to encourage others to THINK!

name: First Awakened Outfit
description: Unlock a set of cosmetic clothing for your character.

name: Complete Winter Clothing Bundle
description: A bundle which contains all the cozy, festive, knitted, patterned, warm and whimsical winter clothing bundles.

name: Handstand Emote Bundle
description: A bundle that contains the "Handstand" and "Handstand Fail" emotes.

name: Leo
description: A ferocious and noble lion. It's also very cute. Once purchased, it can be summoned as a pet through your vault.

name: Patterned Winter Clothing Bundle
description: A bundle of winter clothing that contains a matching winter sweater and beanie for your character.

name: Pumpkin the Qitt Pet
description: This limited item will be available for purchase until November 6th

name: Clockwork Aristocrat Outfit
description: A bundle which contains the Clockwork Aristocrat outfit. This outfit includes a head, torso, belt, hand, leg and feet slot clothing piece.

name: Step on my Enemies
description: Teaches your character to use the "Step on my Enemies" emote

name: Clockwork Mega Bundle
description: A bundle which contains the Clockwork Engineer Outfit, Clockwork Aristocrat Outfit, Chrono the Owl and two Clockwork Furniture Sets.

name: Everwoods Warrior's Outfit
description: A bundle which contains the Everwoods Warrior outfit. This outfit includes a head, torso, belt, hand, leg and feet slot clothing piece.

name: Warm Winter Clothing Bundle
description: A bundle of winter clothing that contains a matching winter sweater and beanie for your character.

name: THIS MUST BE UPDATED TO USE COLLECTIBLE LISTS BEFORE RERELEASE
description: A bundle of various midwinter cabin furniture that could be used to decorate your house and town. Once this bundle is purchased, you can right click it and click "Convert to Deed" to receive it as an item in your inventory. It can then be unpacked into your items!

name: Titan Outfit Bundle
description: This bundle contains both the Titan Gladiator outfit and the Titan Emperor outfit.

name: Pushups
description: Teaches your character to use the "Pushups" emote

name: Gilded Tiles
description: Special tiles which can be used to pave various gilded pavements. Once purchased, this will go into your vault where it can be withdrawn to pave with. Pavements require between 4 and 20 tiles depending on the type of pavement you wish you place. Once this is paved in game, the item cannot be refunded so pave carefully!

name: Emote: Golf Clap
description: This provides your character with a new emote. The emote can be found in your vault once purchased. Use the emote to show your enthusiasm in a classy way.

name: Emote: Twirl Dance
description: This provides you with a new dance for your character! Once purchased, it can be found in your vault

name: Emote: Gentleman's Bow
description: This provides your character with a new emote. The emote can be found in your vault once purchased. Use it to bow like a real Gentleman.

name: Rock Paper Scissors
description: Teaches your character to use the Rock, Paper and Scissors emotes!

name: Get Hyped
description: Teaches your character to use the "Get Hyped" emote

name: THIS MUST BE UPDATED TO USE COLLECTIBLE LISTS BEFORE RERELEASE
description: A massive premium bundle containing many premium items.  Contains: both Everwoods Outfits, Snowball (Pet), an exclusive Golden Party Hat, the Complete Sweater Bundle, 2 sets of the Midwinter Cabin Furniture, 300 Gilded Tiles, and 4 Regal Fabric. Once purchased, you can find the bundle in the "Premium Items" section of your vault

name: Clockwork Furniture Set
description: A set of furniture for your house. Once purchased, these items can be found in your vault. Right click them to withdraw them from your vault and use them in game!

name: Titan Mega Bundle
description: A bundle which contains the Titan Gladiator Outfit, Titan Emperor Outfit, Leo the Lion and Two Titan Furniture Bundles.

name: Hype the Crowd
description: Teaches your character to use the "Hype the Crowd" emote

name: Dramatic Thumbs Up/Down Bundle
description: Teaches your character to use the "Dramatic Thumbs Down" and "Dramatic Thumbs Up" emotes.

name: Snowball
description: A cute little pup. The cold never bothered him.

name: Flex
description: Teaches your character to use the "Flex" emote

name: Titan Gladiator Outfit
description: A full outfit of cosmetic clothing for your character. This outfit includes a head, torso, belt, hand, leg and feet slot clothing piece.

name: Whimsical Winter Clothing Bundle
description: A bundle of winter clothing that contains a matching winter sweater and beanie for your character.

name: Titan Emperor Outfit
description: A full outfit of cosmetic clothing for your character. This outfit includes head, torso, belt, hand, leg and feet slot clothing pieces.

name: Emote: Play Dead
description: This provides you with an emote for your character! Once purchased, it can be found in your vault

name: Clockwork Clothing Bundle
description: A bundle which contains the Clockwork Engineer and Clockwork Aristocrat outfits. These outfits includes a head, torso, belt, hand, leg and feet slot clothing piece.
